bank_defaults.cash_advance: 2.5% (Min. INR 500) of the cash amount; 2% (Min. INR 300) of the cash amount for OLYMPUS Credit Card
bank_defaults.late_fee_tiers: All other Credit Cards: Nil if total payment due is up to INR 500; INR 500 if between INR 501 and INR 5,000; INR 750 if between INR 5,001 and INR 10,000; INR 1,200 if greater than INR 10,000. OLYMPUS Credit Card: INR 100 if total payment due is greater than INR 2,000. Waived for BURGUNDY PRIVATE Credit Card and PRIMUS Credit Card
bank_defaults.source_section: Schedule of Charges: FINANCE / INTEREST CHARGE table (Effective 20th Dec 2024, p.11-14); 2) OTHER FEES and CHARGES table (p.14-18) for Cash withdrawal Fees, Late Payment Fee and Foreign Currency Transaction Fee; section B) Interest-Free Credit Period (p.~37) for interest-free days
